mapper.sql: ID, BIZ_NAME, ROAD_ADDR, LOT_ADDR, PHONE_NO, MAIN_FOOD_TYPE, FOOD_TYPE, BIZ_STATUS_NM, BIZ_STATUS_CD, CLOSURE_DT, APPLY_DT, MGMT_NO
mapper.select: SELECT FROM MODEL_RESTAURANT WHERE BIZ_NAME LIKE '%' || #{bizName} || '%' ORDER BY BIZ_NAME FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
SELECT FROM MODEL_RESTAURANT WHERE MAIN_FOOD_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{foodType} || '%' OR FOOD_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{foodType} || '%' ORDER BY BIZ_NAME FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
SELECT FROM MODEL_RESTAURANT WHERE BIZ_STATUS_NM = #{bizStatusNm} ORDER BY BIZ_NAME FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
